Pronađi Fotografa je profesionalni katal: Find a Photographer is a professional directory for Bosnia and Herzegovina, Serbia, Croatia and the wider region. Search by location, category and date, then contact a professional directly.
Kako pronaći fotografa u mom gradu?: How do I find a photographer in my city?
Koristite pretragu i odaberite svoj grad: Use search and select your city, category and date. We will show available professionals with portfolios and contact details.
Da li plaćam kroz platformu?: Do I pay through the platform?
Ne. Platforma je katalog — fotografa kon: No. This is a directory, so you contact photographers directly without commission.
Kako da znam da li je fotograf slobodan?: How do I know whether a photographer is available?
Svaki profil ima kalendar dostupnosti. P: Every profile has an availability calendar. Date searches show only available photographers.
Mogu li i ja kao fotograf kreirati profi: Can I create a photographer profile?
Da, registrujte se kao fotograf, kreiraj: Yes. Register, create your profile and add your portfolio and work locations. The profile becomes public after approval.
